title: PixelMajorDiam Result
description: Returns length of the major axis of the ellipse found by ArcFinder.
notes:
Returns length of the major axis of the ellipse found by ArcFinder in pixels.  To obtain the value in millimeters, use the FoundMajorDiam result.

See Also: PixelMajorDiam Result

ArcSearchType Property	FoundMajorDiam Result

FoundMinorDiam Result	PixelMinorDiam Result

Vision Objects: PixelMajorDiam Result

ArcFinder
